case_title: HARRY MING VS. KEVIN MESBAH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-24-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) SHERYLN BURA MESBAH. THE JUN-13-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
